name: nous-workspace
description: nous — хосуудын апп. Бүх workflow-г нэг цэгээс удирдах root скриптүүд.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix mobile install
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix mobile run typecheck
scripts.build:images: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.push:images: docker push nurlannn/love-server:latest && docker push nurlannn/love-client:latest
scripts.release: npm run build:images && npm run push:images
